content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Prefix-Suffix Palindrome (Hard version)". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1326/problem/D2
constraints: s consists of lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains a string s.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the length of the longest prefix which is also a suffix.

solution.approach: Use a two-pointer technique to compare characters from the start and end of the string, moving towards the center.

code.Python3:
t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    s = input()
    n = len(s)
    i, j = 0, n - 1
    while i < j and s[i] == s[j]:
        i += 1
        j -= 1
    print(i)
